item.title: GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]
item.description:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]

item.title: Camera Picture Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Picture Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobilephonedata
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Picture Recovery
(Utilities)
Are you distressed of how to rescue multimedia snapshots from corrupted webcam storage device without expert advice or guidance? Download Camera Picture Recovery software from website www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com to regain corrupted snapshots without make any alteration in previous images pixels size. Secure image retrieval tool restore erased pictures lost due to incorrect handing or usage of device media.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS Marketing Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Marketing Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: mobilephonedata
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Marketing Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Want to know, how to use professional messaging utility? Use Bulk SMS Marketing Software which is provided by company on www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com website to compose business product promotion very easily. Text messaging tool is capable to communicate with your family members, relative and save all sent messages in txt file format for future reference. SMS sender program is used for mobile marketing.

Accounting management program can download from company website www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com which is used to analyze profit and loss report within few easy mouse clicks. Use financial accounting application that is capable for creating enterprise transaction report. Inventory Management Application provides a facility to manage income, loss, ledger and balance sheet.

item.title: Train your own AI free now [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Train your own AI free now [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: bimex
item.itunes:summary:
Train your own AI free now
(Developers Apps)
💰 Welcome to Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🚀

Looking to unlock AI excellence without breaking the bank? Look no further! Divora is here to empower everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸


👩‍💼 Are you a small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ An AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉


🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀


🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄


🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡


💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️


Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐 Your affordable AI adventure begins right here – now anyone, including you, can build your very own AI! 🚀✨


Come and experience the magic of AI with Divora – where affordability meets excellence! 🌟🤖
[read more]

item.title: GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Title: Unlocking Unmatched Performance: Introducing Godspeed Termux RAM Booster for No Root Users
In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, the quest for optimizing device performance knows no bounds. For users of Termux seeking to unleash the full potential of their devices without the hassle of rooting, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster emerges as a beacon of efficiency and power. Developed by the acclaimed mind behind the pseudonym "revWhiteShadow," this cutting-edge tool revolutionizes the concept of RAM optimization for non-rooted users.

Understanding the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster
The Godspeed Termux RAM Booster is a sophisticated solution meticulously crafted to elevate device performance to unparalleled heights. It leverages advanced algorithms and optimization techniques to free up RAM, thereby enhancing multitasking capabilities, speeding up app launches, and ensuring a seamless user experience.

Features That Set Godspeed Apart
Efficiency Redefined: Unlike conventional RAM boosters, Godspeed operates with surgical precision, identifying and eliminating resource-hogging processes while preserving essential system functions. This ensures optimal performance without compromising stability.

User-Friendly Interface: Designed with simplicity in mind, Godspeed offers an intuitive interface that empowers users of all levels to optimize their devices effortlessly. With just a few taps, users can initiate the boosting process and witness instant improvements in performance.

Compatibility Across Platforms: Whether you're running Termux on a 32-bit or 64-bit architecture, Godspeed has you covered. Its versatility ensures compatibility with a wide range of devices, allowing users to experience enhanced performance regardless of their hardware specifications.

Continuous Development: The genius behind Godspeed, known as revWhiteShadow, is committed to ongoing development and refinement. Regular updates and enhancements ensure that users always have access to the latest advancements in RAM optimization technology.

How to Supercharge Your Termux Experience with Godspeed
Preparation: Ensure that your Termux environment is up to date by executing the provided package update commands. This ensures compatibility and optimal performance with the Godspeed RAM booster.

Installation: Clone the Godspeed repository from GitHub using the provided Git command. Navigate to the cloned directory and grant executable permissions to the appropriate binary file based on your device's architecture (GSNRRM64 for 64-bit, GSNRRM32 for 32-bit).

Activation: Execute the respective binary file to initiate the Godspeed RAM boosting process. Sit back and witness as Godspeed optimizes your device's RAM, unlocking its true potential without the need for root access.

Conclusion
In a world where speed and efficiency reign supreme, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster stands as a testament to innovation and ingenuity. With its unrivaled performance-enhancing capabilities and user-friendly interface, it empowers Termux users to maximize productivity and enjoyment without the complexities of rooting. Say goodbye to sluggish performance and hello to the lightning-fast responsiveness of Godspeed. Experience the difference today and elevate your Termux experience to new heights.






[read more]
item.description:
GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Title: Unlocking Unmatched Performance: Introducing Godspeed Termux RAM Booster for No Root Users
In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, the quest for optimizing device performance knows no bounds. For users of Termux seeking to unleash the full potential of their devices without the hassle of rooting, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster emerges as a beacon of efficiency and power. Developed by the acclaimed mind behind the pseudonym "revWhiteShadow," this cutting-edge tool revolutionizes the concept of RAM optimization for non-rooted users.

Understanding the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster
The Godspeed Termux RAM Booster is a sophisticated solution meticulously crafted to elevate device performance to unparalleled heights. It leverages advanced algorithms and optimization techniques to free up RAM, thereby enhancing multitasking capabilities, speeding up app launches, and ensuring a seamless user experience.

Features That Set Godspeed Apart
Efficiency Redefined: Unlike conventional RAM boosters, Godspeed operates with surgical precision, identifying and eliminating resource-hogging processes while preserving essential system functions. This ensures optimal performance without compromising stability.

User-Friendly Interface: Designed with simplicity in mind, Godspeed offers an intuitive interface that empowers users of all levels to optimize their devices effortlessly. With just a few taps, users can initiate the boosting process and witness instant improvements in performance.

Compatibility Across Platforms: Whether you're running Termux on a 32-bit or 64-bit architecture, Godspeed has you covered. Its versatility ensures compatibility with a wide range of devices, allowing users to experience enhanced performance regardless of their hardware specifications.

Continuous Development: The genius behind Godspeed, known as revWhiteShadow, is committed to ongoing development and refinement. Regular updates and enhancements ensure that users always have access to the latest advancements in RAM optimization technology.

How to Supercharge Your Termux Experience with Godspeed
Preparation: Ensure that your Termux environment is up to date by executing the provided package update commands. This ensures compatibility and optimal performance with the Godspeed RAM booster.

Installation: Clone the Godspeed repository from GitHub using the provided Git command. Navigate to the cloned directory and grant executable permissions to the appropriate binary file based on your device's architecture (GSNRRM64 for 64-bit, GSNRRM32 for 32-bit).

Activation: Execute the respective binary file to initiate the Godspeed RAM boosting process. Sit back and witness as Godspeed optimizes your device's RAM, unlocking its true potential without the need for root access.

Conclusion
In a world where speed and efficiency reign supreme, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster stands as a testament to innovation and ingenuity. With its unrivaled performance-enhancing capabilities and user-friendly interface, it empowers Termux users to maximize productivity and enjoyment without the complexities of rooting. Say goodbye to sluggish performance and hello to the lightning-fast responsiveness of Godspeed. Experience the difference today and elevate your Termux experience to new heights.






[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Title: Unlocking Unmatched Performance: Introducing Godspeed Termux RAM Booster for No Root Users
In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, the quest for optimizing device performance knows no bounds. For users of Termux seeking to unleash the full potential of their devices without the hassle of rooting, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster emerges as a beacon of efficiency and power. Developed by the acclaimed mind behind the pseudonym "revWhiteShadow," this cutting-edge tool revolutionizes the concept of RAM optimization for non-rooted users.

Understanding the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster
The Godspeed Termux RAM Booster is a sophisticated solution meticulously crafted to elevate device performance to unparalleled heights. It leverages advanced algorithms and optimization techniques to free up RAM, thereby enhancing multitasking capabilities, speeding up app launches, and ensuring a seamless user experience.

Features That Set Godspeed Apart
Efficiency Redefined: Unlike conventional RAM boosters, Godspeed operates with surgical precision, identifying and eliminating resource-hogging processes while preserving essential system functions. This ensures optimal performance without compromising stability.

User-Friendly Interface: Designed with simplicity in mind, Godspeed offers an intuitive interface that empowers users of all levels to optimize their devices effortlessly. With just a few taps, users can initiate the boosting process and witness instant improvements in performance.

Compatibility Across Platforms: Whether you're running Termux on a 32-bit or 64-bit architecture, Godspeed has you covered. Its versatility ensures compatibility with a wide range of devices, allowing users to experience enhanced performance regardless of their hardware specifications.

Continuous Development: The genius behind Godspeed, known as revWhiteShadow, is committed to ongoing development and refinement. Regular updates and enhancements ensure that users always have access to the latest advancements in RAM optimization technology.

How to Supercharge Your Termux Experience with Godspeed
Preparation: Ensure that your Termux environment is up to date by executing the provided package update commands. This ensures compatibility and optimal performance with the Godspeed RAM booster.

Installation: Clone the Godspeed repository from GitHub using the provided Git command. Navigate to the cloned directory and grant executable permissions to the appropriate binary file based on your device's architecture (GSNRRM64 for 64-bit, GSNRRM32 for 32-bit).

Activation: Execute the respective binary file to initiate the Godspeed RAM boosting process. Sit back and witness as Godspeed optimizes your device's RAM, unlocking its true potential without the need for root access.

Conclusion
In a world where speed and efficiency reign supreme, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster stands as a testament to innovation and ingenuity. With its unrivaled performance-enhancing capabilities and user-friendly interface, it empowers Termux users to maximize productivity and enjoyment without the complexities of rooting. Say goodbye to sluggish performance and hello to the lightning-fast responsiveness of Godspeed. Experience the difference today and elevate your Termux experience to new heights.






[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]

item.title: Android Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobilephonedata
item.itunes:summary:
Android Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com provides Android Recovery utility that does not need any special technical assistance from novice users in restoring back their deleted text files and folders from android based handsets. Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

[read more]
item.description:
Android Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com provides Android Recovery utility that does not need any special technical assistance from novice users in restoring back their deleted text files and folders from android based handsets. Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com provides Android Recovery utility that does not need any special technical assistance from novice users in restoring back their deleted text files and folders from android based handsets. Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

[read more]
